hostPersona: 3D Pixar-style animated young tech commentator named Nex; modern gaming/streaming studio with RGB lighting and dual monitors. Energetic, casual, relatable — like a tech YouTube creator.
voiceNotes: ElevenLabs Liam voice used for BOTH TTS narration AND voice change. Conversational, brisker cadence than executive content. Voice-change seed 42 with --remove-bg-noise. Signature sign-off: 'I'm Nex, and I'll catch you in the next breakdown. Peace.'
scriptStyle: Conversational tech-commentary tone — like a YouTube breakdown, smart but not stuffy. 20-25 words per slide (~8-10s of TTS — brisker than executive). References terminal output, code/spec details, product specifics. Numbers spoken as words. No filler phrases. Outro sign-off (scene 21) capped at 15-20 words. Optional 'The Nex Brief' branding (title card + 6s logo intro from assets/nex_brief_intro.mp4).
